name: hedera-demo-yarn-validation
description: Yarn-only deterministic validation for the hedera-demo baseline template. Production build covers TypeScript checks (no separate next:check-types).

commands.name: install
commands.purpose: Install the single Next.js workspace exactly as a scaffold-hbar Yarn repo.

commands.name: lint
commands.purpose: Run the frontend lint command exposed by the root package.

commands.name: build
commands.purpose: Verify the generated Next.js app builds for production.
